candidates.observable_statement: NorthRiver Digital Infrastructure announced groundbreaking for the second phase of its hyperscale data center campus.

candidates.physical_implication: enhanced capability to support more data and services

candidates.observable_statement: Summit Compute Parks announced continued construction of a 250MW data center campus.

candidates.observable_statement: PeakSpan Power Systems announced an expansion of its generator module assembly operations.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Increased investment in assembly capacity for generator modules.

candidates.observable_statement: The expansion increases package throughput for gas and dual-fuel generator systems.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Potential increase in procurement of materials and components for generator systems.
candidates.physical_implication: Increased throughput suggests a need for more resources and possibly new contracts.

candidates.observable_statement: FlexGen Turbine Packages announced an investment in a new manufacturing line for fast-start power equipment.

candidates.observable_statement: The new manufacturing line will support utility balancing needs.

candidates.observable_statement: The investment is associated with balance-of-plant systems.
